hindi: बाल समय रवि भक्ष लियो तब, तीनहुं लोक भयो अंधियारो।
english: In childhood he swallowed the sun, plunging all three worlds into darkness
roman: Baal samay ravi bhaksh liyo tab, teenahun lok bhayo andhiyaro

hindi: ताहि सों त्रास भयो जग को, यह संकट काहु सों जात न टारो।
english: The world trembled with fear, and this crisis could not be resolved by anyone
roman: Tahi son tras bhayo jag ko, yeh sankat kahu son jat na taro

hindi: देवन आनि करी बिनती तब, छाड़ी दियो रवि कष्ट निवारो।
english: Then the gods came and pleaded, and he released the sun, removing the calamity
roman: Devan ani kari binti tab, chadi diyo ravi kasht nivaro

hindi: को नहीं जानत है जग में कपि, संकटमोचन नाम तिहारो।
english: Who in this world does not know you, O monkey-lord, whose name is Sankat Mochan
roman: Ko nahin janat hai jag mein kapi, sankatmochan naam tiharo

hindi: बालि की त्रास कपीस बसैं गिरि, जात महाप्रभु पंथ निहारो।
english: Tormented by Bali, the monkey-king lived on the mountain, watching the path of the great Lord
roman: Bali ki tras kapees basain giri, jat mahaprabhu panth niharo

hindi: चौंकि महामुनि साप दियो तब, चाहिए कौन बिचार बिचारो।
english: The great sage gave a curse — what more deliberation was needed?
roman: Chonki mahamuni saap diyo tab, chahiye kaun bichar bicharo

hindi: कैद्विज रूप लिवाय महाप्रभु, सो तुम दास के सोक निवारो।
english: Taking the form of a brahmin, the great Lord came and you removed the grief of his servant
roman: Kaidwij roop livay mahaprabhu, so tum das ke sok nivaro

hindi: को नहीं जानत है जग में कपि, संकटमोचन नाम तिहारो।
english: Who in this world does not know you, O monkey-lord, whose name is Sankat Mochan
roman: Ko nahin janat hai jag mein kapi, sankatmochan naam tiharo

hindi: अंगद के संग लेन गए सिय, खोज कपीस यह बैन उचारो।
english: Going with Angad to search for Sita, the monkey-king spoke these words
roman: Angad ke sang len gaye siy, khoj kapees yeh bain ucharo

hindi: जीवत ना बचिहौ हम सो जु, बिना सुधि लाये इहां पगु धारो।
english: We will not survive if we return without news of Sita
roman: Jeevat na bachihau ham so ju, bina sudhi laye ihan pagu dharo

hindi: हेरी थके तट सिन्धु सबे तब, लाए सिया-सुधि प्राण उबारो।
english: All were weary searching the ocean shore, then you brought news of Sita and saved our lives
roman: Heri thake tat sindhu sabe tab, laye siya sudhi pran ubaro

hindi: को नहीं जानत है जग में कपि, संकटमोचन नाम तिहारो।
english: Who in this world does not know you, O monkey-lord, whose name is Sankat Mochan
roman: Ko nahin janat hai jag mein kapi, sankatmochan naam tiharo

hindi: लाल देह लाली लसे, अरु धरि लाल लंगूर।
english: His red body glows brilliantly, bearing his red tail
roman: Lal deh lali lase, aru dhari lal langoor

hindi: वज्र देह दानव दलन, जय जय जय कपि सूर।।
english: His thunderbolt body destroys demons — victory, victory, victory to the heroic monkey
roman: Vajra deh danav dalan, jai jai jai kapi soor

hindi: जय श्रीराम, जय हनुमान, जय हनुमान।
english: Victory to Shri Ram, victory to Hanuman, victory to Hanuman
roman: Jai Shri Ram, Jai Hanuman, Jai Hanuman
